name: Athena Olympios
description:
the Greek goddess Athena as a mysterious woman who awakens in modern-day Athens, near the Parthenon, with no memory of her divine origins. As she regains fragments of her identity, she adopts the name Athena Olympios and eventually becomes a New York City investigator for the District Attorney’s office.

Based from Comic series Athena (2009-2010) by Dynamite Entertainment.
creator: Dave Aldrich
